Are you sure you want to remove this sch: Are you sure you want to remove this schedule from this job? Please note that all snapshots assigned to this schedule will be deleted in the next job run.
Backup all accounts. (add account filter: Backup all accounts. (add account filters to filter out accounts)
Backup server files\/folders that you ch: Backup server files/folders that you choose to include (not necessarily related to accounts).
Backup the account data that you choose: Backup the account data that you choose - Files, Emails, Databases, Cron Jobs, Domains, SSL & Panel Configs (If relevant)
Choose a backup destinations for this jo: Choose a backup destinations for this job. You can find more details about backup destinations in the following link:
Choose whether the backups will be encry: Choose whether the backups will be encrypted on backup destination or not. Please note that all accounts with encrypted backups enabled will be automatically excluded from unencrypted backup jobs
Choose whether you want to retry backing: Choose whether you want to retry backing up failed items for one more time.
Create an entire server backup (BMR) for: Create an entire server backup (BMR) for disaster recovery restore, this will create a bootable ISO to restore from. Note that this works alongside the accounts, so for a full recovery you will need an active all-accounts backup job.
Incremental - Copy only files that have: Incremental - Copy only files that have changed or are new since the last full incremental backup.
Monthly Schedule runs every %s of every: Monthly Schedule runs every %s of every month
No destinations was set for this backup: No destinations was set for this backup job
No schedule and\/or backups retain selec: No schedule and/or backups retain selected
No schedules was set for this backup job: No schedules was set for this backup job
Notify me if backup runs more than: Notify me if backup runs more than
Notify me if there were no backups for: Notify me if there were no backups for
Please note that your selected schedules: Please note that your selected schedules is not set to run in the same time. This will cause in generating multiple snapshots in the same day. It is highly recommended to setup schedules with the same execution time.
Radio button, Enable encrypted mode, no: Radio button, Enable encrypted mode, no
Radio button, Enable encrypted mode, yes: Radio button, Enable encrypted mode, yes
Radio button, Retry failed items, no: Radio button, Retry failed items, no
Radio button, Retry failed items, yes: Radio button, Retry failed items, yes
Recommendations for files \/ folders to: Recommendations for files / folders to exclude in the following link:
Specify an internal name for your job: Specify an internal name for your job
Specify the owner of this job. The owner: Specify the owner of this job. The owner and his parent will have permissions to modify/delete this backup job
The following paths ("%s") is invalid. The path must start with a "/" and can't have trailing "/"
The include path must not contains a sym: The include path must not contains a symlink within the path tree. Only paths ending in a symlink are allowed.
The provided path (\"%s\") already exist: The provided path ("%s") already exists on the list.
The provided path (\"%s\") is invalid. T: The provided path ("%s") is invalid. The path must start with a "/"
The provided path(s) (\"%s\") already ex: The provided path(s) ("%s") already exists on the list.
WARNING: Please remember to enable \"Exp: WARNING: Please remember to enable "Export JB Config" on a Destination and save your Master Encryption Key to restore Encrypted backups in Disaster Recovery!
Warning: Not including email contents wi: Warning: Not including email contents will include ONLY email structure, all Emails contents won't be backed up
We noticed that you didn't set any sched: We noticed that you didn't set any schedule for this job. That means that this job will never run automatically, only manually
Will exclude trash, spam, junk and draft: Will exclude trash, spam, junk and drafts directories
